title: Cool and smooth — important
motto: Cool and smooth is important — thermal headroom, microsecond-smooth timing, physics-smooth motion, calm operator surfaces.

cool.meaning: Stay thermally cool — bounded joules, backoff before blast, no busy-wait burn.
cool.presume_rule: FIELD_SKIP_COVER and cooperative yield — never spin hot

smooth.meaning: Smooth operator experience — on-point resume, lattice motion, event-driven panels.
smooth.presume_rule: resumed_on_point — drift_us within tolerance; uninterruptable commits honored; resources still devoted
smooth.motion_rule: physics_mode gravity lattice — no Matrix snap
smooth.panel_rule: Parallel slice publish — no single-thread stall

soldier_requirement: Every autonomous Soldier runs cool and smooth — war does not excuse thermal blast or jank.
